transcript: Hi guys, I'm going to show you how to perfectly prepare a pineapple. Place your pineapple on its side and secure it in place with one hand while you top and tail it using a sawing action. Then move in a barreling motion down around the pineapple. We've left very little flesh on the skin. Cut through into nice slices. If you've got a corer, use that to take the center of the pineapple out. If you haven't, then I'm using this cookie cutter. Place the metal ring on top of the pineapple, over the core, and then push down. Give it a twist, and out comes the core. If you want to turn it into chunks very simply cut through and there you've got beautiful pineapple chunks. That's how to perfectly prepare a pineapple. If you want any more tips click on the link.
